settings.headline: A more advanced anti-aging routine, built around provider review.
settings.subhead: Skinfluence is designed for women ready to move beyond over-the-counter skincare and into a more guided, more consistent treatment model.

settings.headline: What it’s designed to help improve
settings.body: Skinfluence is designed for women noticing the early signs that their routine is no longer doing enough, including fine lines, uneven-looking tone, rougher texture, dullness, and a complexion that looks more tired or less refined than it used to.

settings.headline: Why this feels different
settings.body: Most anti-aging skincare asks you to keep adding more products and hoping for better results. Skinfluence takes a different approach. It begins with evaluation, includes provider review, and turns anti-aging care into a more focused monthly routine built for consistency.

settings.label: Want stronger anti-aging support than standard skincare
Prefer a simpler routine over product stacking
Are ready for a more guided approach
Value visible progress over trend-driven skincare shopping

settings.headline: What to expect
settings.body: This is not overnight skincare. Anti-aging treatment works best when it is consistent, realistic, and easy to stay with. Some users may experience an adjustment period before settling into their routine. The goal is gradual, visible improvement in skin quality over time.

settings.headline: Safety and side effects
settings.body:
Prescription-led skincare should come with clear expectations. Common adjustment effects may include dryness, sensitivity, peeling, or irritation. That is why provider review, instructions, and ongoing support are part of the experience.

Treatment is not appropriate for everyone, and eligibility is determined through the evaluation process.

settings.headline: See if Skinfluence is right for your skin.
settings.subhead: Start with evaluation, then move into monthly care if approved.
